# Harness reference

## Commands

- `setup`: `pnpm install && pnpm exec playwright install chromium`
- `unit`: `pnpm test:unit` — 快速逻辑与进程内单测
- `run`: `pnpm dev` — 本地 Electron 开发态 (long-running)
- `renderer-e2e`: `pnpm test:e2e:renderer` — 自启动/清理的 renderer 用户流
- `electron-e2e`: `pnpm test:e2e:electron` — 启动真实 Electron 的 main/preload/IPC 回归

## Registered knowledge

- `.agents/knowledge/architecture.md` (role=architecture)
